sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; function ResultCard({ job }) { const [open, setOpen] = useState(false); return ( <>
setOpen(true)} style={{ cursor: "pointer" }} >
{job.title}

{job.company}

Match: {job.match}% {job.location?.join(", ")}
{open && (

{job.title}

Company: {job.company}

Location: {job.location?.join(", ")}

Stipend: {job.stipend}

Required Skills
{job.skills?.map((skill, i) => ( {skill} ))}

Apply Now 🚀
)} ); } export default ResultCard;
